subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-12 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The matters of history in the Torah are not from Moses, but from Ezra. Its laws are from Moses, and the proof lieth in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مسائل تاریخی تورات از حضرت موسی نیست،  از عزراء  است.  احکامش از موسی است و برهان بر
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
